_note: Slug -> recursive.eco grammar UUID (the deckId) for the Nara channel. Used by recursive.eco to bind repo grammars to their live rows and to build per-deck links (open/read = https://flow.recursive.eco/play?id=<id>). _public_now lists the slugs that are is_public=true on recursive.eco (only public grammars import as channel members). Keep this updated when new grammars are created. Mirrors recursive-tarot/tarot/_eco_ids.json shape.
